messages.content: give me a short description of the GPT4.1 models

GPT-4.1 is an advanced language model developed by OpenAI, building upon the capabilities of GPT-4. It features improved reasoning, accuracy, and responsiveness compared to earlier versions. GPT-4.1 is designed to handle more complex instructions, maintain better contextual understanding over longer conversations, and provide more reliable answers across a wide range of topics. It also includes enhancements in coding, mathematics, and safety, making it more robust for both casual and professional use cases.

translate to chinese description: OpenAI's GPT4.1 models outperform GPT‑4o and GPT‑4o mini across the board, with major gains in coding and instruction following. They also have larger context windows—supporting up to 1 million tokens of context—and are able to better use that context with improved long-context comprehension. They feature a refreshed knowledge cutoff of June 2024.
OpenAI 的 GPT-4.1 模型在各方面均优于 GPT-4o 和 GPT-4o mini，特别是在编程能力和指令执行方面有显著提升。该模型还支持更大的上下文窗口，可处理最多 100 万个标记的上下文，并在长上下文理解方面表现更为出色。同时，其知识截止时间更新为 2024 年 6 月。
